steps.title: Use the vertex form
steps.content:
The maximum height is $200$ feet at $t=3$, so the vertex is $(3{,}200)$. A quadratic with that vertex has the form:
$$
f(t)=a(t-3)^2+200
$$

steps.title: Write the model
steps.content: Substitute $a=-16$ into the vertex form: $$ f(t)=-16(t-3)^2+200 $$ This is the equation with vertex $(3{,}200)$ and initial height $56$. The answer is D.
